Why we made these

Two ordinary problems, solved plainly.

For families

Screen time isn't the enemy. Boredom is.

Four activity and coloring books that genuinely hold a child's attention, cost less than one streaming month, and never need a login.

For creators

Selling by DM shouldn't feel like guesswork.

A pack of tested WhatsApp and DM scripts that turns cold "hi, interested?" messages into replies — no agency retainer required.

The collection

Five guides, from a child's first maze to a creator's next sale.

Each is sold on its own or bundled together at a lower combined price. Every purchase unlocks instant download — no account required.

How you pay

A checkout built to be simple, even if you've never touched crypto before.

Every order is priced in US dollars first. At checkout, that price is locked for 15 minutes in USDT so nothing shifts while you pay. You can scan a code, tap a button in the Binance app, or paste an address — whichever is easiest.

Secured by NOWPayments
Binance Pay accepted
Fixed-price, no surprises

Questions

Before you check out

Your payment is processed by NOWPayments and confirmed directly on the blockchain, so there's a public, traceable record of the transaction. Your price is locked for 15 minutes, so what you agree to pay is what you pay — no surprise conversion.

Yes. The checkout guide walks you through buying a small amount of USDT on an exchange like Binance, sending it to the address shown, and confirming your order — most first-time buyers finish in under five minutes. If you get stuck, our support inbox will walk you through it personally.

Once the blockchain confirms your payment, you're redirected to a download page immediately and we also email your files and receipt to the address you provided at checkout.

If a product isn't right for you, write to us within 7 days of purchase and we'll refund you in USDT to the wallet address you send payment from. Full terms are on our Refund Policy page.

Ready for your next chapter?

Every product is instantly downloadable and backed by a 7-day guarantee. Checkout takes about two minutes, wallet or no wallet.
